rationale: The subject home is identified by the orange dashed bounding box centered approximately at pixel (540, 530). The orange box spans roughly 227 px wide (≈48.1 ft) × 336 px tall (≈71.2 ft), giving a bounding-box area of ~3,424 sq ft. The roof is a complex multi-section hip structure with 3–4 distinct hip sections separated by valley lines, oriented predominantly N–S. The roof fills an estimated 77% of the bounding box (lower corners have visible open ground and a tree is clipped at the southern base), yielding a footprint of ~2,640 sq ft. Ridge lines are short horizontal peaks atop each hip section (~5 segments, ~36 ft total). Hip lines are numerous given the multi-section geometry (~11 hips, ~161 ft total). Valley lines are prominent darker diagonal lines between sections (~6 valleys, ~74 ft total). Rake lines are minimal as this is predominantly a hip roof with one small possible gable (~12 ft). Eave lines trace the horizontal lower perimeters of each section (~112 ft total). Confidence is moderate (0.45) due to the roof's complexity, overlapping sections, and partial shadow obscuring some edges.
